title: Saskatchewan startups turning to AI to start businesses, accelerate growth
description: Local tech startups based in Saskatoon say artificial intelligence is helping them develop and scale their businesses much faster than imagined.
content:

title: College of Charleston embraces AI in the classroom, teaching students to use it responsibly
description: While many colleges are banning generative artificial intelligence tools like ChatGPT, professors at the College of Charleston School of Business are taking a different approach: teaching students how to use them.
content:
CHARLESTON, S.C. (WCSC) — While many colleges are banning generative artificial intelligence tools like ChatGPT, professors at the College of Charleston School of Business are taking a different approach: teaching students how to use them.

title: Has Technology Ruined The World Cup?
description: This comes after FIFA invested years developing tools that combine player tracking, artificial intelligence and ball sensors to reduce human error in crucial moments.
content:
Soccer has always embraced innovation, albeit reluctantly.
In the 1990s, the back-pass rule changed the way teams built from the back. A decade ago, goal-line technology finally settled arguments over whether the ball had crossed the line.
Today, the... [5224 chars]

title: Benitez presents AI regulation bill to business leaders in summit
description: MANILA, Philippines — Negros Occidental Rep. Javier Miguel Benitez has presented a proposal that would develop and regulate Artificial Intelligence during a summit organized by the Management Association of the Philippines and accounting firm KPMG.

title: HCLTech wins $1.14 billion AI contract from European Fortune Global 50 company
description: Company said the contract will involve establishing an artificial intelligence-driven operating model to transform and manage the customer’s global digital work
content: HCLTech has won a strategic contract worth $1.14 billion from a Europe-headquartered Fortune Global 50 company to modernise the client’s digital workplace and enterprise network operations, the Indian IT services company said on Friday. The agreement... [1852 chars]

title: Mukesh Ambani, Sunil Mittal named founding members of global AI panel
description: Indian business titans Mukesh Ambani and Sunil Mittal have joined the AI for Good Global Commission, a new initiative by the International Telecommunication Union. This influential group, comprising global leaders and industry heads, aims to foster trustworthy and inclusive artificial intelligence. A primary goal is to bridge the digital divide, ensuring AI benefits everyone and addresses global challenges, rather than exacerbating existing inequalities.

title: crime' AIn't a policing option
description: Law enforcement agencies around the globe are increasingly turning to artificial intelligence for crime prevention, attempting to incorporate predictive analytics reminiscent of science fiction narratives. However, the presence of algorithmic biases and the risk of errors, such as racial profiling, raise serious concerns.

title: Expert Warns: Copper Demand Surges, With Supply Deficit Expected
description: The ongoing artificial intelligence (AI) boom is driving a surge in copper demand that will lead to an unavoidable supply deficit within five years, according to veteran natural resource investor Rick Rule. title: Is the US Economy Strong Enough to Support Its Own AI Infrastructure Buildout?
